title: diphasiastrum platyrhizoma
intro: Diphasiastrum platyrhizoma, also known as the flat-leaf forked-leaved club moss, is a type of lycopodiopsid plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum platyrhizoma include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in the recovery from injuries and infections. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
